entities.name: Personal data
entities.description: Personal data or personal information means any information about you that enables you to be identified personally. It covers obvious information such as your name and contact details, but it also covers less obvious information such as identification numbers, electronic location data and other online identifiers that can be linked with such information in order to identify you. It does not include data where the identity has been removed (anonymous data).

entities.description: Secure, scalable, and efficient consensus model designed to support reliable onchain data storage.

entities.name: 16TB partitions
entities.description: Storage partitions of 16 terabytes that miners are responsible for storing and ensuring availability and verifiability of historical data.

entities.name: Periodic validation checks
entities.description: Regular checks that verify storage obligations and incentivize ongoing compliance.

entities.name: $IRYS
entities.description: Native token used as collateral by miners and to govern mining rewards on the Irys Network.

entities.name: Stake
entities.description: Collateral locked by miners in IRYS tokens; forfeited for failing to uphold responsibilities.

entities.name: Mining rewards
entities.description: Rewards distributed to miners based on storage contributions and reliability.

entities.name: Useful Proof of Work
entities.description: Transforms computational effort into a tool for verifying storage integrity.

entities.name: storage integrity verification
entities.description: Process of verifying that storage integrity is maintained.

entities.name: Mining on Irys
entities.description: Mining activity on Irys; described as contributing to the protocol’s purpose rather than merely expending energy.

entities.name: block production
entities.description: Process of producing new blocks in the protocol.

entities.name: storage validation
entities.description: Process of validating storage as part of the protocol.

entities.name: hybrid model
entities.description: A model that integrates uPoW and staking to scale efficiently alongside network demands.

entities.name: uPoW
entities.description: A component of the hybrid model used with staking to scale efficiently.

entities.name: consensus mechanism
entities.description: Irys's consensus mechanism that operates through four distinct steps.

entities.name: stable block rewards
entities.description: A benefit provided by Irys Network to miners and developers.

entities.name: predictable costs
entities.description: A benefit provided by Irys Network to miners and developers.

entities.name: system that grows with increasing storage needs
entities.description: A feature of Irys Network describing a system that scales with storage demands.

entities.name: IRYS Token
entities.description: Token used as collateral by miners on the Irys Network.

entities.name: 16TB partitions of data
entities.description: Data partitions of 16 terabytes each to which mining resources are pledged.

entities.name: Partition ID
entities.description: Identifier assigned to a pledged partition after a pledge.

entities.name: Irys Protocol
entities.description: Protocol that assigns Partition IDs after a pledge.

entities.description: URLs to access uploaded files via the gateway (e.g., transactionId-based URL and manifestId/fileName URL).

entities.name: datachains
entities.description: A system where data is treated as a static, passive entity that is collected, stored, and left to rest.

entities.name: execution_chains
entities.description: A storage layer described as an alternative to datachains.

entities.name: programmable_data
entities.description: Data that can act, respond, and evolve through interaction with smart contracts.

entities.name: smart_contracts
entities.description: Programmable code that executes predefined logic on a blockchain to enable data to act.

entities.name: Data Layer
entities.description: Data layer referenced as part of Irys, providing the pathway to IrysVM for onchain execution.

entities.name: Data on Irys
entities.description: Data equipped with instructions carrying properties and rules, moving across applications and capable of interacting with smart contracts.

entities.name: Onchain execution
entities.description: Execution of instructions directly on the blockchain.

entities.name: First-generation datachains
entities.description: Older datachains contrasted with Irys's onchain approach.

entities.name: Royalty structures
entities.description: Royalty structures that data on Irys can enforce.

entities.name: Interaction rules
entities.description: Rules for interaction with other applications that data on Irys can carry.
